review_text: After taking the ashwagandha capsules for a month, my stress levels have noticeably reduced and my sleep quality has improved significantly. I feel calmer and more in control.
The bottle arrived completely damaged — the seal was broken and the product had leaked all over the packaging. Had to throw most of it away.
Way too expensive compared to similar Ayurvedic products available on Amazon. I can get the same quality for half the price from other brands.
I had an issue with my order and the customer support team resolved it within 2 hours with a full refund. Very impressed with the quick and helpful response.
The aloe vera juice is extremely bitter, almost undrinkable even after chilling. I have tried mixing it with other juices but the taste is still overwhelming.
